name: ExtensionDevice_ConformsTo_Version
title: R5: Specific form or variant of the standard (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Device.conformsTo.version` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Device.conformsTo.version` 0..1 `string`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Device.conformsTo.version` 0..1 `string`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Device.conformsTo.version` has a context of Device.specialization based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Device`.
Element `Device.conformsTo.version` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Specific form or variant of the standard (new)

element.short: Specific form or variant of the standard
element.definition: Identifies the specific form or variant of the standard, specification, or formal guidance. This may be a 'version number', release, document edition, publication year, or other label.
